title: How Muscle Messengers Shield Your Brain from Decline
description: Exercise does more than build strength—it sends molecular messengers called myokines from your muscles to your brain. This piece explores how these signals, like BDNF and irisin, promote new brain cells, enhance memory, and may even slow Alzheimer’s. Learn why your next workout could be a cognitive lifeline.
